citations: Input text: 'AI memory systems need durable source evidence Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state'

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems require durable source evidence to ensure factual accuracy and traceability.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable to maintain precision and verifiability.
A semantic index can improve recall in memory systems, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state to preserve autonomy and consistency.

details: Extracted 3 atomic memory cards with explicit entities and relationships.
Preserved ambiguity in tradeoff statements to avoid premature resolution.
